People

Davide Fabiocchi

PhD Candidate

human-robot collaboration · virtual simulation · industrial engineering
Areas
human-robot collaboration
virtual simulation
industrial engineering
Links
PhD StudentsIEIE Minutes 2023

Davide Fabiocchi is listed among the IEIE PhD students in Industrial Engineering with Hermes Giberti and Marco Carnevale as tutors.

The doctoral minutes for the XXXIX cycle associate his fellowship topic with industrial human-robot collaboration through virtual simulation. His profile therefore fits RAMSLAB work on collaborative robotics, digital environments, and simulation-driven industrial processes.

Department
Department of Industrial and Information Engineering
ai.rams@unipv.it
